string.text: Eye zoom between hip FOV and free-zoom FOV. Toggle flips. Zoom in / out force one side. Works with any item in hands. Cancels when you open inventory, PDA, dialog, ADS, or reload. Unbind stock Free Zoom if that mod is enabled.
Turn free zoom on or off. Turning off restores hip FOV immediately.
Flip between hip FOV and free-zoom FOV.
Go to free-zoom FOV. No change if already there.
Go to hip FOV. No change if already there.
Scroll up zooms in, scroll down zooms out. In gameplay this blocks weapon-switch on scroll. PDA and inventory keep normal scroll.
Swap scroll up/down for free zoom.
How many scroll notches in the same direction (within the gap time) before zoom in or out. Raise this for twitchy mice. Default: 1
Max time between scroll notches that still count toward one zoom. Older notches drop. Default: 100 ms
How much to shrink FOV while free zooming. Higher = stronger. 0% = none (toggle does nothing), 40% ~ old Free Zoom default, 90% = max. Default: 40%
How much to shrink FOV while aiming down sights. Higher = stronger. 15% ~ old Free Zoom default. Default: 15%
Slow walk while free zooming (sprint uses a milder share of the same setting, matching old Free Zoom). 0% = no slowdown, 40% = old Free Zoom run slowdown. Default: 40%
Write free zoom events to the game log.
